text.title: AI-Assisted Specification Writing Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: LLM output merged without human gate; sprint blocks on missing AC.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects spec without `reviewer:` and gate timestamps.

antipattern.symptom: Spec ignores template; task generator cannot parse.
AC list is plausible but cites no evidence; PM cannot defend.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires evidence citation per AC.
